name: ACTION TITLE
purpose: The page's governing thought: a full sentence with a number, plus the DL's chrome (kicker and eyebrow) when the language asks for it.

sample.title: Erection recovered to 84%, six days behind forecast

rules: the title is a full sentence stating the finding with a number; no verb or no number means rewrite
eyebrow and kicker render only when the DL chrome asks; the component never invents them
qa: title has a verb and a number
chrome matches the DL flags exactly
